title: Fabric's OptiFine
description: OptiFine replicated as close as possible on the newest versions of Minecraft on the fabric mod loader.
body:
A very lightweight modpack replicating the OptiFine mod as close as possible to the original.
![In game screenshot showing the frames per second](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b00366b01f343677b5bab8e2acba72ff83fad876.jpeg)

### Performance Boost
This modpack uses many modern performance mods made for the fabric mod loader aiming to provide the best performance boost you can get, the same as the OptiFine mod does.

### Features from OptiFine
Fabric's OptiFine has almost all original OptiFine features such as, Shaders, Zoom (By holding C on your keyboard), Connected Textures, OptiFine required Resource packs, 3D Animations for custom mob or player textures, contains no content mods so it can be used on any server.
And Many other Smaller OptiFine features.

### Can be used as a base modpack
As this modpack contains no content mods feel free to use this as a base for your own modpacks.

### Updates
Fabric's OptiFine is made by 1 person only (Me, DXROK) so updates can take time also as new versions of Minecraft usually dont support mods that havent been updated yet that will also delay updates and also mean some versions of this modpack will have better or more features than others.
I will do my best to make all updates as similar as possible.

### Additional Info
Fabric's OptiFine comes with no pre-installed shaders or resource pack so you will need to add your own.

Settings and Configs are adjusted to give you the best performance while keeping the game smooth and good looking but feel free to change anything to your liking.

Any issues can be reported on my Discord server which can be joined here. > [Discord](https://discord.gg/eD7QH2qF)
